title: paronychia mexicana subsp. monandra
intro: Paronychia mexicana subsp. monandra is a subspecies of the Paronychia mexicana plant, commonly known as Mexican paronychia, which belongs to the Nyctaginaceae family. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Paronychia mexicana subsp. monandra include its ability to treat skin conditions such as eczema, acne, and wounds, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory issues. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
